seo.title: Temporary Care Staff in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing supplies pre-vetted, CQC-compliant temporary care staff across London. Flexible cover for single shifts, block bookings, or ongoing placements.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Flexible, fully vetted temporary care staff supplied across Greater London — healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners for single shifts, block bookings, or ongoing cover.
fields.heading: Temporary Care Staff in London
fields.image_alt: Agency care worker in London assisting an elderly client in supported living

fields.body: Temporary staffing keeps a service running when the rota does not go to plan. Vigil Care Staffing supplies flexible, fully vetted temporary care staff to providers across Greater London, so you can cover sickness, annual leave, a sudden rise in dependency, or a busy period without leaving a shift short. We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners to care homes, supported living services, and other care settings. Every worker is DBS-checked, referenced, and directly employed, and we match each request to people whose skills and experience fit the role. Whether you need a single shift, a block booking, or ongoing cover while you recruit, we build the arrangement around your rota. Vigil Care Staffing supplies workers only and does not operate regulated care services, so our whole focus is finding you dependable staff and following up promptly on every request.
fields.heading: Flexible temporary cover for London care providers

items.body: We prioritise your request and work quickly to place a suitable temporary worker, drawing on our vetted pool across Greater London to reach you at short notice.
items.title: Rapid Response

items.body: Every temporary worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, so flexible cover never means a drop in standards.
items.title: Fully Vetted Staff

items.body: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners, matching the role to the gap you need to fill.
items.title: Wide Role Coverage

items.body: Book a single shift, a block of shifts, or open-ended cover while you recruit, with arrangements that flex around your rota rather than a fixed contract.
items.title: Flexible Arrangements

items.body: We match each placement to workers whose experience and skills suit the setting, from residential care to supported living and specialist services.
items.title: Skill Matching

items.body: Our workers are based across North, East, South, Central, and West London, which helps us reach your service with staff familiar with local care settings.
items.title: Borough-Wide Network

fields.body: Flexible cover only works if every temporary worker is properly checked. Before any placement, we complete enhanced DBS checks, verify each worker's right to work, and take up professional references from previous care employers. We assess relevant skills for the role, and because our workers are directly employed we keep their training and documentation current through ongoing development. Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process, giving providers clear, documented assurance about the people supporting their service and helping you maintain safer staffing records.
fields.heading: Our vetting and compliance process
fields.image_alt: Temporary care staff in London supporting residents in a care home

items.a: We treat staffing requests as a priority and work to place a suitable, vetted worker as soon as possible. The exact timing depends on the role, location, and dates, and we will always be honest with you about what we can achieve.
items.q: How quickly can you supply temporary care staff?

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and healthcare cleaners for temporary cover across Greater London. Tell us the role and setting and we will match accordingly.
items.q: What roles can I book on a temporary basis?

items.a: Yes. You can book a single shift, a block of shifts, or ongoing cover while you recruit. The arrangement flexes around your rota and can be extended if the need continues.
items.q: Can I book a single shift as well as longer cover?

items.a: Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, with relevant skills assessed for the role, whether the booking is planned ahead or arranged at short notice.
items.q: How are your temporary workers vetted?

items.a: We supply temporary care staff to providers across Greater London and can discuss the specific area you need covered.

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance
